news.t: Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year
Pacer ETFs Celebrates 7th Birthday, Year of Rapid Growth Amid Market Challenges
Pacer ETFs' New Funds Pinpoint Opportunities in Supply Chain and Data Industries

holdings.infoBox: TRFK is an equity ETF with a total of 94 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.38%, Broadcom at 7.62%, Micron Technology at 6.97%, SK Hynix Inc DR at 6.48%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 5.01%.

overview.description: The Pacer Data and Digital Revolution ETF (TRFK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks market cap-weighted index of global companies involved in the use, manipulation, transmission, and storage of data, as well as the ancillary services that enable these processes. TRFK was launched on Jun 8, 2022 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer Data Transmission and Communication Revolution Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs' New Funds Pinpoint Opportunities in Supply Chain and Data Industries
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $SHPP #ETFs--Pacer ETF launches two new ETFs that target opportunities in supply chain and data industries
